title: Aloha, Oahu
subtitle: May 11 – 19, 2026
tagline: A young couple's easy days adventure

days.label: Arrival
days.summary: Land at 10:28 PM. Just get to the hotel and rest.

events.title: Land at HNL
events.details: Clear customs, collect baggage. Allow 30–40 min.

events.title: Rideshare to Bamboo Waikiki
events.details: Uber or Lyft from arrivals · ~25 min · ~$25
alternates: Pre-book SuperShuttle if heavy bags

events.title: Check in & unpack
events.details: Ask for a high floor — ocean views if available.

events.title: Late bite on Kalakaua Ave
events.details: Marukame Udon — open late, cheap, authentic.
alternates: Waikiki Brewing Co for something heartier
Snacks from hotel if exhausted

events.title: Waiola Shave Ice (optional)
events.details: First taste of Hawaii. Get li hing mui + ice cream base.
alternates: Skip if tired — sleep is more important tonight

events.title: Sleep
events.details: Big week starts tomorrow!

days.label: Day 1
days.summary: Pick up the car, stock up at Costco, then dive into Waikiki Beach.

events.title: Pick up Hertz at Hyatt Regency
events.details: Steps from Bamboo on Kalakaua Ave. Confirm car category (compact SUV / midsize). Decline CDW if credit card covers it.

events.title: Breakfast · Heavenly Island Lifestyle
events.details: Acai bowls, fresh fruit plates, avocado toast. Arrive early — very popular.
alternates: Eggs n Things for classic Hawaiian
Hotel grab-and-go if tight on time

events.title: Costco Iwilei — stock-up run
events.details: 525 Alakawa St · ~12 min drive · Opens 10am sharp. Reef-safe sunscreen, water, ginger chews, fruit, macadamia chocolates.

events.title: Back to Bamboo — unload & pack cooler
events.details: Stock fridge, load cooler for the week, keep fruit accessible.

events.title: Waikiki Beach
events.details: Swim, bodyboard, surfboard rental or beginner lesson (~$40–60).
alternates: If light rain: Royal Hawaiian Center covered arcade
events.outfit: Swimsuit + rash guard · flip flops · hat · reef-safe sunscreen
events.weather: Brief showers pass in minutes · UV still high under cloud

events.title: Lunch · Ono Seafood
events.details: Fresh poke, local favourite. Queue worth it.
alternates: Rainbow Drive-In for plate lunch
Tucker & Bevvy for gourmet sandwiches

events.title: Island Vintage Coffee
events.details: Sunrise acai bowl + shave ice. Open-air Royal Hawaiian Center setting.
alternates: Bogart's Café for quieter spot

events.title: Royal Hawaiian Hotel · Pink Palace
events.details: Free to walk through historic 1927 lobby. Mai Tai Bar on the beach — she gets mocktail, you get original Mai Tai.

events.title: Waikiki Market fruit haul
events.details: Exotic fruits: white pineapple, apple banana, dragon fruit, lychee, rambutan. May = mango season starting!

events.title: Kuhio Beach Torch Lighting & Hula Show
events.details: Right on the beach. Ancient Hawaiian ceremony + hula performance. ~45 min.

events.title: Dinner · Duke's Waikiki
events.details: Right on the beach. Hula pie dessert — share it!
alternates: Marukame Udon — cheap & delicious
Waikiki Brewing Co — craft beer + food
Dessert after: Waiola Shave Ice — try haupia flavour

events.title: Park car at SpotHero spot
events.details: Pre-booked overnight spot · walk back to Bamboo

days.label: Day 2
days.summary: Iolani Palace, Chinatown, then Ho'omaluhia Botanical Garden and Byodo-In Temple. Sunset cocktails to finish.

events.title: Breakfast · Café Julia
events.details: Locally-sourced breakfast in a beautiful historic building near downtown.
alternates: Liliha Bakery for legendary coco puffs
Hotel breakfast for slow start

events.title: Iolani Palace
events.details: Only royal palace in the USA. Self-guided audio tour ~1.5 hrs. $25/person. Tue–Sat. Air-conditioned, flat, perfect for wellness.
alternates: If sold out: walk exterior + State Capitol + King Kamehameha Statue

events.title: Chinatown · Madre Chocolate + market
events.details: Madre Chocolate — bean-to-bar Hawaiian chocolate tasting + take-home bars. Maunakea Marketplace — fresh young coconut, exotic fruit stalls.
alternates: Mango Mango Dessert in Chinatown for mango pudding

events.title: Lunch · Lucky Belly
events.details: Inventive Asian-fusion. Excellent noodles.
alternates: Livestock Tavern — locally-sourced, beautifully done
Maunakea Marketplace food court — chaotic & wonderful

events.title: Drive to Ho'omaluhia (~25 min)
events.details: Heading to the windward side via Pali Highway.
events.weather: May see brief shower crossing the Ko'olau — normal & beautiful

events.title: Ho'omaluhia Botanical Garden
events.details: FREE · 400 acres · stunning Ko'olau mountain backdrop · completely flat · peaceful. Picnic with your Chinatown fruit haul.
alternates: If raining: drive slowly through — still beautiful
events.outfit: Comfortable walking shoes · hat · light rain jacket

events.title: Byodo-In Temple
events.details: ~10 min from Ho'omaluhia · $5 entry · stunning Japanese Buddhist temple. Free-roaming peacocks, koi pond, sacred bell.
alternates: Skip if tired — head back to Waikiki for longer rest

events.title: Drive back to Waikiki
events.details: ~35 min · freshen up at hotel

events.title: House Without a Key · Sunset
events.details: Sunset cocktails at Halekulani · live Hawaiian music + hula dancer. She gets hibiscus mocktail, you get a classic.
alternates: Mai Tai Bar at Royal Hawaiian if full
events.outfit: Smart-casual to slightly dressy · this is a beautiful moment
events.weather: Golden hour · magical light · warm & calm

events.title: Dinner · Nobu Honolulu
events.details: World-class Japanese-Peruvian. Black cod miso is unmissable.
alternates: Senia — creative Hawaiian tasting menu
Arancino di Mare — lighter Italian seafood

events.title: Tantalus Lookout night drive
events.details: ~15 min · FREE · Best panoramic night view of Honolulu — city lights, Diamond Head, ocean.
alternates: Skip if tired — absolutely fine

days.label: Day 3
days.summary: Pearl Harbor in the morning, then lunch at Haleiwa Joe's Kaneohe and Kailua town browse.

events.title: Leonard's Bakery · hot malasadas!
events.details: Opens 6am. 933 Kapahulu Ave. Original glazed + custard-filled + ube + haupia.
alternates: Hotel snack + stop Leonard's on way back
events.outfit: Modest clothing — covered shoulders · Pearl Harbor is a memorial
events.weather: Cool early morning · light layer useful

events.title: Drive to Pearl Harbor (~25 min)
events.details: Much more comfortable than TheBus.
events.outfit: Comfortable walking shoes · light layer for A/C

events.title: USS Arizona Memorial
events.details: 23-min documentary then boat to memorial over sunken Arizona. 1,177 sailors still entombed. Profoundly moving.
events.weather: Air-conditioned film room · outdoor boat — bring layer

events.title: USS Missouri Battleship
events.details: Where Japan surrendered to end WWII. Walk the famous surrender deck.
alternates: Skip if tired — Arizona Memorial is the essential one

events.title: Drive to Haleiwa Joe's Kaneohe
events.details: ~20 min · beautiful windward garden restaurant.

events.title: Lunch · Haleiwa Joe's Kaneohe
events.details: Fresh seafood in gorgeous open-air garden setting. Macadamia-crusted mahi mahi, calamari, fresh fish tacos.
alternates: Kailua Town Café for lighter option
Kalapawai Café in Kailua for deli-style

events.title: Kailua town browse
events.details: Charming beach town · independent boutiques · local art.
alternates: Cinnamon's Restaurant — guava chiffon pancakes (unique to Hawaii!)
Agnes' Portuguese Bake Shop for malasadas

events.title: Drive back to Waikiki
events.details: ~35 min via Pali Hwy · beautiful mountain scenery.

events.title: Hotel rest
events.details: Easy and relaxed downtime · feet up · eat Costco fruit.

events.title: BOOK HANAUMA BAY NOW!
events.details: hanaumabaystatepark.com · $25/person · Book for Saturday May 16. Slots open exactly 2 days ahead — tonight is your window.

events.title: Relaxed dinner · Ramen Nakamura
events.details: Excellent tonkotsu · local favourite.
alternates: Wailana Coffee House — old-school diner, relaxed
Room service if she needs early night

days.label: Day 4

weather.note: Manoa always misty · clears by noon

days.summary: The big day. Manoa Falls, Pali, Lanikai, Kualoa Ranch, Giovanni's, optional Polo Beach.

events.title: Early light breakfast
events.details: Hotel grab-and-go or Costco fruit + granola bars. Don't hike on heavy stomach.
alternates: McDonald's Saratoga (24hr) if you need hot food fast
events.outfit: Waterproof hiking shoes · moisture-wicking top · quick-dry shorts · small backpack

events.title: Drive to Manoa Falls (~20 min)
events.details: Pack: water, Costco snacks, light rain jacket.
events.weather: Manoa is a rainforest — it WILL be misty/drizzly · normal & beautiful

events.title: Manoa Falls Hike
events.details: 1.6mi round trip · 150ft waterfall · lush jungle. Go at partner's pace · turn back if uncomfortable.
events.outfit: Waterproof shoes ESSENTIAL · light rain jacket · hat
events.weather: Expect mist & light rain · refreshing not unpleasant

events.title: Drive to Pali Lookout (~15 min)
events.details: Crossing the Ko'olau ridge — weather changes dramatically.

events.title: Nu'uanu Pali Lookout
events.details: $7 parking · jaw-dropping windward views · legendary winds · 20–30 min stop.
events.weather: Almost always breezy · hold onto belongings

events.title: Morning Brew or Cinnamon's · Kailua
events.details: Coffee + acai bowl · rest after hike.
alternates: Kalapawai Café for pastry + coffee

events.title: Lunch · Kalapawai Café Kailua
events.details: Fresh deli sandwiches · grab a picnic to take to Lanikai.
alternates: Over Easy for brunch if timing works

events.title: Lanikai Beach
events.details: One of Hawaii's most beautiful beaches · powder sand · sea turtles. Park at Kailua Beach Park · 15 min walk.
events.outfit: Swimsuit under clothes · rash guard · flip flops
events.weather: Warm sunny windward afternoon · UV HIGH

events.title: Drive to Haleiwa (~45 min)
events.details: Scenic Kamehameha Hwy coastal route.
events.weather: North Shore usually clears by afternoon

events.title: Giovanni's Shrimp Truck
events.details: Iconic North Shore experience · garlic butter shrimp · eat at picnic tables. Cash preferred. Expect queue.
alternates: Romy's Shrimp for quieter alternative nearby

events.title: Matsumoto's Shave Ice + Haleiwa browse
events.details: Classic North Shore shave ice since 1951. Rainbow + azuki beans + ice cream inside.
alternates: Aoki's Shave Ice if queue too long
Guava Shop · Celestial Natural Foods for local goods

events.title: Polo Beach (optional)
events.details: 68 Farrington Hwy Waialua · ~10 min west · remote, uncrowded. Near Mokuleia polo fields — possibly horses!
alternates: SKIP if tired — Haleiwa is already a great end
events.outfit: Swimsuit if you want to swim · sandals

events.title: Drive back via H-2 (~55 min)
events.details: Faster return via freeway.

events.title: Hotel · shower & rest
events.details: Mandatory rest — big day. Feet up.

events.title: Dinner · save the splurge
events.details: Nobu Honolulu if you didn't go Wed · black cod miso.
alternates: Senia for creative Hawaiian
Modest Kitchen for relaxed end to day
Dessert: Lapperts Hawaii ice cream

days.label: Day 5
days.summary: Early start for Hanauma Bay snorkel, then Halona Blowhole and Sandy Beach drive.

events.title: Wake up early
events.details: Snacks & water ready from last night · two alarms set.
events.outfit: Swimsuit + rash guard UNDER clothes · water shoes · hat

events.title: Drive to Hanauma Bay (~25 min)
events.details: Parking fills fast — arrive before 7am for best spots.
events.weather: Clear east side morning forecast · excellent conditions

events.title: Hanauma Bay — opening time
events.details: Show pre-booked tickets ($25/person) · Mandatory 9-min reef video. Calm shallow water — perfect for wellness.
events.outfit: Rash guard ESSENTIAL · water shoes · polarised sunglasses
events.weather: Below-normal rainfall east side · UV very high · sunscreen critical

events.title: Snorkel the reef
events.details: Tropical fish, sea turtles, parrotfish, humuhumunukunukuapuaa. Inner bay calm & shallow.

events.title: Beach break & snack
events.details: Costco snacks · rest · reapply sunscreen.
events.weather: UV at peak · stay in shade or reapply every 30 min

events.title: Drive to Halona Blowhole (~5 min)
events.details: Tiny detour off Hwy 72 — roadside pull-off.

events.title: Halona Blowhole
events.details: Ocean forces through lava tube · spectacular water spout. Also Eternity Beach below (From Here to Eternity film).
alternates: Skip Eternity Beach hike if tired — view from roadside is great

events.title: Sandy Beach
events.details: Famous bodysurfing beach · powerful shore break · amazing to watch. Don't swim — unsafe for wellness.

events.title: Leonard's Bakery (round 2)
events.details: Hot malasadas — try custard-filled + ube + haupia. Buy a box.
alternates: Agnes' Portuguese Bake Shop for different style

events.title: Lunch · Rainbow Drive-In
events.details: Classic Hawaiian plate lunch · very close to Leonard's.
alternates: Zippy's — beloved local chain · chili & zip pac bento
Side Street Inn — pork chops legendary

events.title: Hotel · afternoon rest
events.details: Long early morning — mandatory rest.

events.title: Sunset on Waikiki Beach
events.details: Golden hour · shoes off · toes in the sand. One of the best sunsets of the trip.

events.title: Dinner · Hy's Steak House
events.details: Classic Waikiki fine dining since 1976 · tableside flambé.
alternates: Arancino di Mare — lighter seafood pasta
Nico's at Pier 38 — fresh local fish casual
Dessert: Waiola Shave Ice — different flavour tonight

days.label: Day 6
days.summary: A relaxed recovery day. Liliha Bakery, Ala Moana Beach, shopping, last hula show.

events.title: Breakfast · Liliha Bakery
events.details: Legendary coco puffs (chocolate cream puffs — extraordinary). Get there early — Sunday queue builds fast.
alternates: Café Kaila in Market City for beautiful brunch
Eggs n Things for macadamia pancakes
events.outfit: Casual sundress or shorts · comfortable sandals

events.title: Morning swim · Waikiki
events.details: Easy relaxed swim · no agenda.
alternates: Walk to Kapiolani Park for Sunday morning scene

events.title: Ala Moana Beach Park
events.details: Less crowded than Waikiki · calm lagoon · Magic Island peninsula adjacent.

events.title: Lunch · Ala Moana Center
events.details: Goma Tei Ramen — outstanding broth · local favourite.
alternates: Marukame Udon · Poke to the Max
Mango Mango Dessert — paradise for fruit lovers!

events.title: Ala Moana Center browse
events.details: Hawaii's best mall · Mango Mango if you skipped at lunch · Longs Drugs for snacks · Guava Shop for Hawaiian prints.

events.title: Magic Island walk
events.details: Beautiful peninsula · local families picnicking · views back to Diamond Head. Flat, easy, beautiful.

events.title: Kuhio Beach Hula Show
events.details: FREE · Sundays 6–7:30 PM · last chance to see this on your trip.

events.title: Dinner · Morimoto Asia
events.details: Iron Chef Morimoto's Waikiki spot · exceptional Asian fusion · fresh seafood.
alternates: Nobu Honolulu if you haven't been
House Without a Key for repeat sunset magic

events.title: Evening stroll + begin packing
events.details: Final shave ice — try a new flavour tonight.

days.label: Day 7

weather.note: North Shore AM cloud · clears by show

days.summary: Last morning swim, drive to PCC, spend the afternoon at village tours, luau dinner and fire show.

events.title: Breakfast · Eggs n Things
events.details: Macadamia nut pancakes + fresh fruit crepes + lilikoi syrup.
alternates: Wailana Coffee House — save for tomorrow
Hotel room service for slow morning

events.title: Last morning swim
events.details: Final Waikiki swim · soak it in.

events.title: Check out + store luggage
events.details: Hotel front desk holds bags until tonight.

events.title: Drive to PCC (~55 min)
events.details: Scenic drive to Laie · flexibility vs rigid shuttle schedule.
alternates: Stop Matsumoto's Shave Ice in Haleiwa on the way
events.outfit: Smart-casual · comfortable shoes · light cardigan for evening
events.weather: North Shore AM cloud usually clears by midday

events.title: Village tours begin
events.details: Samoa · Tonga · Hawaii · Fiji · Tahiti · Aotearoa. Participate: coconut husking, poi pounding, fire making. Pace yourself — pick 3–4 to go deep.

events.title: Canoe pageant on the lagoon
events.details: Beautiful water show · find good seats early · 30 min.

events.title: Village shopping
events.details: Local crafts · Polynesian souvenirs · authentic gifts.

events.title: Ali'i Luau Buffet Dinner
events.details: Hawaiian feast · kalua pork · lomi lomi salmon · poi · HAUPIA for dessert — go back for seconds! Avoid white clothing.
events.outfit: Avoid white · smart-casual · cardigan for later

events.title: Ha: Breath of Life · Fire show
events.details: Spectacular outdoor Polynesian fire & acrobatics show · world-class. Find seats 20 min early.

events.title: Drive back to Waikiki (~55 min)
events.details: No shuttle constraints — leave when you want.
alternates: Stop Matsumoto's on way back if still open

events.title: Return Hertz at Hyatt
events.details: Steps from Bamboo · check fuel before return · top up nearby if needed.

events.title: Back at Bamboo — final night
events.details: Collect stored bags · pack remaining items.

days.label: Depart
days.summary: Final breakfast, last walk on Waikiki Beach, then home.

events.title: Breakfast · Wailana Coffee House
events.details: Old-school Waikiki diner since 1969 · huge portions · fresh fruit platter.
alternates: Hotel breakfast for slow morning

events.title: Last walk on Waikiki Beach
events.details: Shoes off · toes in the sand · final Diamond Head photo · fresh young coconut from a vendor.

events.title: Last-minute stops
events.details: Airport has Hawaiian Host macadamia chocolates at good prices. Longs Drugs / ABC Store for any forgotten gifts.

events.title: Rideshare to HNL Airport
events.details: Uber or Lyft · ~25 min · ~$25 · book 10 min before.

events.title: Check in & security
events.details: Allow 2.5 hrs before departure · TSA PreCheck if you have it.

events.title: DEPART HONOLULU
events.details: Mahalo & Aloha. You'll be back.

bookings.notes: ~$50/person · Easy and relaxed · Jurassic Park valley
Set up payment at home · download both
Confirm rental coverage + medical travel cover

costco.note: Good for sensitive stomachs · carry in bag
Cold drinks on North Shore loop

foodGuide.name: Leonard's Bakery
foodGuide.what: Hot malasadas · original · ube · custard · haupia

foodGuide.name: Waiola Shave Ice
foodGuide.what: Li hing mui + ice cream base

foodGuide.name: Matsumoto's Shave Ice
foodGuide.what: Rainbow + li hing + ice cream inside

foodGuide.name: Haleiwa Joe's Kaneohe
foodGuide.what: Catch of day · macadamia mahi mahi

foodGuide.name: Maunakea Marketplace
foodGuide.what: Fresh coconut · exotic fruits · food court

foodGuide.name: Ono Seafood
foodGuide.what: Best poke in Waikiki · fresh ahi
